motionDetected = None

core._color_enabled = Dobot.PORT_GP2
device.set_color(enable=True, port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)


# --- SCRIPT START ---
while (ir_detected("GP4")) == False:
  script_conveyor(0.5, 1, 0)
if (ir_detected("GP4")) == True:
  script_conveyor(0, 1, 0)
  motionDetected = True
  if motionDetected == True:
    motionDetected = False
    sync_move_to(256.24, -73.24, 38.89, 0)
    sync_move_to(256.24, -73.24, 5, 0)
    core.set_vacuum(True)
    sync_move_to(256.24, -73.24, 40, 0)
    sync_move_to(238.48, -151.96, 40, 0)
    sync_move_to(238.48, -151.96, 30, 0)
    while motionDetected == False:
      if (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[2] == 1):
        log('blue detected')
        sync_move_to(200, 0, 10, 0)
      elif (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[0] == 1):
        log('red detected')
        sync_move_to(200, 0, 50, 0)
      elif (device.get_color(port=Dobot.PORT_GP2)[1] == 1):
        log('green detected')
        sync_move_to(200, 0, 110, 0)
